title: Li Auto Q3 2024 Earnings Results Summary
text: Li Auto achieved record quarterly revenue of RMB 42.9 billion ($6.1 billion), exceeding analyst expectations of RMB 41.27 billion. This represented a 23.6% year-over-year increase and 35.3% sequential growth. Vehicle sales reached RMB 41.3 billion, up 22.9% annually and 36.3% from Q2. Net income hit RMB 2.82 billion, surpassing the consensus estimate of RMB 2.38 billion. Non-GAAP net income was RMB 3.9 billion, up 11.1% year-over-year. The company delivered a record 152,831 vehicles in Q3, representing 45.4% year-over-year growth and 40.75% sequential improvement. Gross margin stood at 21.5%, compared to 22.0% in the prior year. Vehicle-specific margin was 20.9%, reflecting lower costs offset by reduced average selling prices. Research and development expenses declined to RMB 2.6 billion, down 8.2% annually. Cash reserves strengthened to RMB 106.5 billion. Q4 guidance appeared modest relative to Q3 performance. The company projected 160,000-170,000 deliveries and revenue guidance ranged from RMB 43.2-45.9 billion. Li Auto's stock declined 5.32% to $27.40 in pre-market trading following the earnings announcement.
